LGIC.Advancement.Title: Level-Gated Item Choice
LGIC.Advancement.Hint: Choose items from a pool that expands by advancement level.
LGIC.Config.PoolHint: Drop each item into the level section where it first becomes available. Click a level header to collapse or expand it.
LGIC.Warning.DropOnLevel: Drop the item onto one of the level sections.
LGIC.Warning.Unavailable: {name} is not available from this advancement at level {level}.
LGIC.Warning.InvalidSelection: One or more selected items are not available at level {level}.
LGIC.Notification.Registered: Level-Gated Item Choice is registered. Parent pools can receive child pools by matching Pool ID / Parent Pool ID.
LGIC.Notification.NotRegistered: Level-Gated Item Choice did not register. Make sure the dnd5e system is active and version 5.3.x is installed.
LGIC.Config.PoolRoleHint: Standalone uses only this pool. Parent receives child pools that target its Pool ID. Child contributes its pool to a parent and does not create its own selection flow.
LGIC.Config.PoolIdHint: For a parent pool, set the ID that child pools should target. Leave blank for standalone pools.
LGIC.Config.ParentPoolIdHint: For a child pool, enter the parent Pool ID to merge into. Child advancements do not prompt for choices.
LGIC.Config.SectionTitleHint: Optional title for this region. If left blank, the default level label is used.
LGIC.Notification.PendingChildPools: Merged {count} pending child pool(s) from selected but not-yet-added items.
